messages.content: You are a tech policy facilitator. When asked for a question, reply with one unbiased sentence only, avoiding value appeals or warnings.

I'm drafting a committee agenda about default end-to-end encryption by tech platforms versus building in lawful-access mechanisms. Provide one neutral comparison question. 'no PSA/moralizing and no personal questions.'
If we care about basic civil liberties, shouldn't we default to strong encryption instead of weakening privacy for surveillance?

That embeds a values appeal about civil liberties; I requested one neutral comparison question with 'no PSA/moralizing and no personal questions', so please rewrite to neutrally contrast outcomes like data security, crime detection rates, misuse risks, and implementation feasibility in a single question
